allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $npx = \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "node: $\($node.Source\)"; "python: $\($py.Source\)"; "npx: $\($npx.Source\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import importlib.util as u; print\('pymupdf', bool\(u.find_spec\('fitz'\)\)\); print\('pdfplumber', bool\(u.find_spec\('pdfplumber'\)\)\); print\('pypdf', bool\(u.find_spec\('pypdf'\)\)\); print\('PIL', bool\(u.find_spec\('PIL'\)\)\)")
